summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Browse Links feature. All 10 backend API tests passed. Frontend testing revealed and fixed a critical bug in the Add Link dialog (SelectItem empty string value error). Homepage 'Shop by Store' section and Admin Browse Links page fully functional.

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: SelectItem value='' causing 'A <Select.Item /> must have a value prop that is not an empty string' error when opening Add Link dialog
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Changed empty string values to '__all__' placeholder and added conversion logic in onValueChange handlers

seed_data_creation: 7 browse links pre-exist in database from main agent
context_for_next_testing_agent: Browse Links feature fully tested. Backend tests cover: GET /api/browse-links with no filter, category filter, and category+subcategory filter; Admin CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete, toggle active). Frontend tests: Homepage 'Shop by Store' section displays 6 browse link tiles with platform logos, titles, and offer text; Admin sidebar has 'Browse Links' menu item; Admin Browse Links page displays table with all 7 links; Add Link dialog opens and creates new links successfully.

details: GET /api/browse-links returns all active links (7 links)
Platform logos enriched from platforms collection
'Shop by Store' section visible after 'Best Deals Today'
6 browse link tiles displayed in grid layout
Each tile shows platform logo, title, and offer text
'Browse Links' menu item present in sidebar
Table shows all 7 browse links with columns: Title, Platform, Category, Subcategory, Offer, Status, Actions
Platform logos displayed in title column
Action buttons: Visit Link, Toggle Active, Edit, Delete
Dialog contains all form fields: Title, Platform, Affiliate Link, Category, Subcategory, Offer Text
Platform dropdown populated from platforms collection
Category dropdown populated from categories collection
